title: neillia densiflora
intro: Neillia densiflora, also known as the Korean lilac, is a flowering plant native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating headaches and body aches, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Neillia densiflora is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
